[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01110001 4
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 00000000 a
5 00000000 a
6 11001000 3
7 11101111 7

01 10 11101111 7 match 7
12 21 11101111 7 match 7
23 32 10101110 5
34 43 11111011 7
45 54 11111111 a
56 65 11111111 a
67 76 01111111 7
70 07 11111001 6

02 20 11101110 6
13 31 11101111 7 match 7
24 42 11111111 a
35 53 11111101 7
46 64 11011111 7
57 75 11110101 6
60 06 11001111 6
71 17 11111111 a

03 30 11101000 4
14 41 11111111 a
25 52 11110111 7

47 74 11111011 7
50 05 11111101 7
61 16 11101111 7 match 7
72 27 01110111 6

26 62 00101111 5
37 73 11111001 6
